tweets.text:
Giving AI agents direct write access to local files is a security risk. I built a dual-vanguard consensus loop:

- Generator (Gemini): Proposes edits (read-only)
- Auditor (Claude): Checks & writes patch
- Human: Approves merge

https://t.co/GzkM7cVoEc #AI #selfhosted
